description_long: This rifle features a long, robust barrel with a dark, metallic finish and angular, modern design elements. The stock is skeletonized, providing a lightweight yet sturdy rear section, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. A prominent scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating the rifle is designed for precision shooting at long distances. The magazine is detachable and box-shaped, positioned just ahead of the trigger guard. The muzzle end appears to have a specialized device, likely a muzzle brake or compensator, to reduce recoil. The overall construction suggests a tactical, high-powered firearm suitable for urban or marksman roles.
description: A modern, angular rifle with a skeletonized stock, long barrel, mounted scope, and detachable box magazine, finished in dark metallic tones.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, skeletonized stock, scope, and magazine clearly.
description_view_1: Barrel-end view highlighting the muzzle device and narrow profile of the barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features with clear visibility of the stock and scope.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's structure and the alignment of the scope and barrel.
